title: Good: Explicit ownership semantics in net_recv_data comment
description:
The comment block at lichen_l2.c:429-436 explicitly documents ownership transfer semantics for net_pkt after net_recv_data():
- Success: stack takes ownership, caller must not touch pkt
- Failure: caller retains ownership, must unref

This is exactly the kind of comment that saves hours of debugging. Worth defending if someone tries to 'simplify' by removing comments.

Location: firmware/bridge-zephyr/subsys/lichen/lichen_l2.c:429-436
